category_sources: source_facts.description says it strips TeX or LaTeX commands from documents; official README says OpenDetex removes TeX constructs from text files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses OpenDetex; source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the main documentation; repository includes detex.1 manual page source for command usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/pkubowicz/opendetex; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TeX/LaTeX stripping; official GitHub topics include tex and latex, and README documents detex command files.
